name: Mandarin Shrimp and Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Large shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Place broccoli, red and yellow peppers, and onion in a 3-quart casserole dish. Cover with lid or vented plastic wrap.
2. Microwave on high for 5 minutes, stirring midway through cooking.
3. Place shrimp on top of the vegetables.
4. In a 2-cup glass measure, combine marmalade, garlic, and ginger root. Microwave on high for 40 seconds, or until marmalade melts.
5. Pour over shrimp; re-cover. Stirring midway through cooking, microwave on high for 4-5 minutes.
6. In the same glass measure, combine soy sauce, vinegar, and Tabasco. Blend in cornstarch. Drain liquid from casserole into the cornstarch mixture.
7. Stirring midway through cooking, microwave on high for 1-2 minutes, or until the mixture thickens.
8. Stir the thickened mixture into the shrimp mixture. Serve over hot rice immediately.
